# Half-pint

> [!note] 📖 Attachment · Cost: **1** · Lore

*Item.*

---

Attach to a character.
**Refresh Action**: Discard Half-pint to heal up to 2 damage from attached character. Then, put an **_Item_** attachment in your discard pile on the top of your deck.
